channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Wildfires and smoke impact World Cup 2026 in Canada and the US
item.description: Wildfires across Canada have caused severe air quality issues, with Toronto recording the worst air pollution in the world. Over 1.9 million hectares of land have been burned, prompting evacuations an...

item.title: EU Mandates Google to Share Search Data and Open Android for Rival AI Companies
item.description: The European Union has imposed new regulations requiring Google to share anonymized search data with rival companies and open up its Android platform to allow alternative AI assistants to function on ...

item.title: Canadian Red Cross launches flood relief campaign for Ottawa residents
item.description: The Canadian Red Cross has initiated a fundraising appeal to support residents impacted by the 2026 Ottawa floods. This campaign aims to provide essential aid, including temporary housing, food securi...

item.title: Sen. Tommy Tuberville Faces Criticism After Claiming Some U.S. Senators Were Not Legally Elected Without Providing Evidence
item.description: Sen. Tommy Tuberville (R-Ala.) sparked widespread criticism after claiming during an interview on Newsmax that four or five current U.S. senators 'didn't legally win' their elections and therefore sho...

item.title: Umahi Warns Against Politicising Nurse’s Death, Denies Foul Play
item.description: Dave Umahi, Minister of Works, has denied any foul play in the death of nurse Mary Habila, urging against politicizing her passing. During a press conference in Abuja, he emphasized that her death sho...

item.title: Wildfires reveal ancestral sites of California tribe, reshaping historical understanding
item.description: The wildfires that devastated 95% of the Konkow Valley Band of Maidu’s forests in California have uncovered over 1,200 ancestral sites, transforming the tribe’s connection to their history. For centur...

item.title: Idac Investigator Continues Testimony at Madlanga Commission, Denies Involvement in Cabal
item.description: Investigative Directorate Against Corruption (Idac) investigator Brian Padayachee is continuing his testimony before the Madlanga commission of inquiry, focusing on allegations of corruption and polit...

item.title: Bea and Vincent Share Details About Their Upcoming Wedding Ceremony
item.description: The article discusses the latest updates on the wedding plans of actress Bea Alonzo and businessman Vincent Co. It mentions that more information has been shared regarding their upcoming nuptials, inc...

item.title: Mutoid Man highlight similarity between FIFA 2026 anthem and their track 'Call Of The Void'
item.description: The heavy metal band Mutoid Man, comprising members from Cave In, Converge, and High On Fire, have publicly noted that the official 2026 FIFA World Cup theme song bears a striking resemblance to their...

item.title: Corus Moves Calgary and Edmonton News Production to Toronto Amid Job Cuts and Financial Struggles
item.description: Corus Entertainment Inc., parent company of Global News, announced plans to consolidate its technical production for Calgary and Edmonton broadcasts into Toronto. This restructuring aims to enhance bu...

item.title: Gauteng pork sector faces over R10m losses from African swine fever outbreaks
item.description: The Gauteng pork industry has suffered significant financial losses exceeding R10 million due to seven outbreaks of African swine fever (ASF) in the City of Tshwane since November 2025. Over 60,000 pi...

item.title: Omar Abdullah Urges Government to Show Compassion Towards Sonam Wangchuk on Hunger Strike
item.description: In a recent statement, Jammu and Kashmir Chief Minister Omar Abdullah highlighted the need for humanity and compassion in politics while criticising the Central government for not engaging with climat...

item.title: Weston townhouse development approved after decade of planning
item.description: After a decade of planning and numerous development applications, Village Building Co has secured approval to commence construction of 168 townhouses at the former Australian Police Force complex in W...

item.title: Tanzania leads regional security dialogue in SADC ministerial summit
item.description: A high-level Tanzanian delegation has arrived in Malawi to participate in a critical Southern African Development Community (SADC) security summit, underscoring Tanzania's commitment to regional coope...

item.title: Alexa Ilacad's Slambook Insights into Her Role in 'Miss Behave'
item.description: The article discusses the revelations from the S.O.S.H Slambook about Alexa Ilacad's portrayal of Marla Briones in the TV series 'Miss Behave.' The Slambook, a popular student activity at State Omni-S...

item.title: Federal Govt Launches $500m Research Fund for Genomics and Innovation
item.description: The Federal Government has launched the Nigeria Genomic City, a national initiative to position Nigeria as a leading hub for genomics, biotechnology, and precision medicine. Minister Maruf Tunji Alaus...

item.title: Uncle of Ann Widdecombe Murder Suspect Expresses Shock at Nephew's Arrest
item.description: The uncle of a man arrested on suspicion of murdering Ann Widdecombe has described his shock at the arrest, stating he 'nearly fell to the floor' upon hearing the news. The suspect, a 28-year-old whit...

item.title: Sara Duterte's Net Satisfaction Rating Increases to +31 in June According to SWS Survey
item.description: A Social Weather Stations (SWS) survey released on July 16, 2026, revealed that Vice President Sara Duterte's net satisfaction rating improved to +31 in June 2026, up two points from +29 in March. The...

item.title: Flash Floods in Texas Kill 2, Rescue Over 200 as Emergency Warnings Persist
item.description: Relentless rains triggered flash flood emergencies across Texas Hill Country on July 16, 2026, leading to deadly conditions and extensive rescues. Texas Governor Greg Abbott confirmed two fatalities d...

item.title: New Zealand's Long-Term Governance Challenges and Policy Solutions
item.description: As New Zealand approaches its next general election, political focus is on immediate issues like cost of living crises and housing affordability. However, addressing long-term challenges such as an ag...
